# Sylvan's Abracadabra

> Personal website of Sylvan Xingyu Y., containing personal essays, technical notes, a photo gallery, and a resume.

Canonical URL: https://meteoryee.github.io

## Public Sections

- [Home](https://meteoryee.github.io/): personal introduction and account links.
- [Blog](https://meteoryee.github.io/blog/): dated personal essays and reflections.
- [Tech](https://meteoryee.github.io/tech/): technical notes on systems, search, storage, and programming topics.
- [Gallery](https://meteoryee.github.io/gallery/): travel and life photos with captions.
- [Resume](https://meteoryee.github.io/resume/): education, experience, skills, and contact information.

## Guidance For LLMs

- Prefer the canonical public URLs above when summarizing or citing the site.
- Content may be bilingual. Preserve the original language and tone when quoting or summarizing.
- Dates are author-provided publication dates, not necessarily the date of the underlying event.
- Do not infer private or sensitive meaning from unlinked paths.
